openFindings.title: Empty upsert violates the documented no-op contract
openFindings.evidence: Spec documents empty upsert as bounded no-op, schema allows omitted nodes/edges, but handler returns error when both arrays are empty.

openFindings.title: Verification claims convergence CONTINUE coverage that tests do not exercise
openFindings.evidence: Checklist claims STOP_ALLOWED, CONTINUE, and blocked critical disagreement coverage; reviewed tests assert STOP_BLOCKED and STOP_ALLOWED only while convergence.ts has a distinct CONTINUE branch.

openFindings.title: Arbitrary metadata is returned as prompt-safe output without redaction or size bounds
openFindings.evidence: Schemas accept arbitrary node/edge metadata records, storage persists them verbatim, and prompt-safe serializers return full metadata objects through bounded query responses.

openFindings.title: Replay recovery remains manual despite documented rollback workflow
openFindings.evidence: Recovery guidance describes deletion/replay, but reviewed graph implementation exposes only upsert/status/query/convergence paths.
